pack.icp: Solo SEO consultants managing 10-50 client pages across multiple countries.
pack.competitor_gap: Rank trackers show movement, but do not explain low indexing causes by country.
pack.positioning: Country-specific indexing diagnostics for SEO consultants.
pack.outreach: I am testing indexing diagnostics for SEO consultants. Would feedback on your current workflow be useful? Reply stop if not relevant.
pack.landing: Find why country-specific SEO pages are not indexed.
pack.roadmap: Day 1: interview 5 consultants. Day 2: ask about current spend. Day 3: test pricing page. Day 4-6: collect replies. Day 7: decide.
